description: Curated registry of Aglet plugins. The `aglet marketplace` CLI fetches this file for discovery; actual installs go through pip so any PyPI package can be used even if not listed here.

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-perception-passthrough
plugins.description: Copies raw_input.text into parsed_input.query unchanged.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-memory-sliding-window
plugins.description: Per-conversation sliding-window over message history.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-memory-rag
plugins.description: LanceDB-backed vector recall with pluggable embedders.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-memory-summary
plugins.description: Rolling LLM-summarised conversation history for long chats.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-planner-echo
plugins.description: Deterministic, zero-dependency planner for tutorials and tests (no LLM).
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-planner-react
plugins.description: Function-calling ReAct planner driven by any ModelProvider.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-planner-reflexion
plugins.description: Self-critique + retry wrapper around any inner planner.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-planner-tot
plugins.description: Tree-of-Thoughts sampling: N candidates in parallel, evaluator picks best.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-planner-workflow
plugins.description: Declarative-DAG planner: walk a fixed node graph instead of letting an LLM decide.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-tool-local-python
plugins.description: Register local Python callables as invokable Tools.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-tool-http-openapi
plugins.description: Expose HTTP endpoints (inline schema or OpenAPI) as Tools.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-tool-mcp
plugins.description: Adopt MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers as Tools over stdio.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-tool-subagent
plugins.description: Wrap another agent.yaml as a callable Tool — the multi-agent primitive.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-executor-sequential
plugins.description: Invoke the planner's next_action serially through the ToolHost.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-safety-budget
plugins.description: Minimal Safety technique — just re-asserts the Runtime Budget.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-safety-constitutional
plugins.description: Constitutional-AI style safety: declare principles, LLM judge enforces them on pre/post checks.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-output-streaming-text
plugins.description: Chunk the planner's final answer into N-character pieces and stream them.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-obs-console
plugins.description: Print every Event to stdout, one line each.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-obs-jsonl
plugins.description: Append every Event to a per-run JSONL trace file.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-obs-otel
plugins.description: Emit OpenTelemetry spans for every Agent run.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-obs-langfuse
plugins.description: Ship every Agent run as a LangFuse trace.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-extensibility-hooks
plugins.description: Built-in hook techniques: tool_audit, cost_tracker, tool_gate.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-model-openai
plugins.description: OpenAI-compatible chat / embeddings provider (OpenAI, Azure, vLLM, Together, DeepSeek, Moonshot, ...).
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-model-litellm
plugins.description: LiteLLM multiplexer — route to 100+ models via one config.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors

plugins.name: aglet-builtin-model-mock
plugins.description: Deterministic mock ModelProvider for tests / CI / offline demos.
plugins.author: The Aglet Contributors
